title: Create pypptx.py bootstrap entry script
description: Create pypptx.py at the repo root implementing the _bootstrap() function pattern from the spec. The function must: (1) return immediately when str(_VENV) in sys.prefix (already inside managed venv), (2) create .venv using subprocess + stdlib venv module when venv_py does not exist, (3) install click, defusedxml, python-pptx (not Pillow) via venv pip with --quiet, (4) call os.execv to re-execute the full process inside the venv. After bootstrap returns, insert _SKILL_DIR onto sys.path[0] and call pypptx.cli.cli(). Include #!/usr/bin/env python3 shebang and make the file executable (chmod +x).
acceptance_criteria: pypptx.py exists at repo root with #!/usr/bin/env python3 shebang
_VENV is set to _SKILL_DIR / '.venv' where _SKILL_DIR is Path(__file__).parent
_bootstrap() returns immediately when str(_VENV) in sys.prefix
venv is created via subprocess.check_call([sys.executable, '-m', 'venv', str(_VENV)]) when venv_py is absent
sys.path.insert(0, str(_SKILL_DIR)) placed after _bootstrap() call so pypptx package is importable
